title: CTOV - Beautify Compat
description: Compatibility datapack for beautify mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Beautify. You will find a Botanist shop in the village centre. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Beautify mod**

Beautify mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village).
